title: Suit Loadouts Used
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM SwitchSuitLoadout WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT SuitName AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM SwitchSuitLoadout WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY SuitName ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {count} suit loadout switch(es) recorded during the report period. Your most-used suit is the clearest indicator of your Odyssey identity — Dominator means soldier, Maverick means operative, Artemis means scientist.
details.help: SwitchSuitLoadout fires each time the player changes to a different suit loadout slot. SuitName contains the suit type.

tagLines: Suit deployment frequency logged. Tactical preferences noted by the Pilots Federation Operational Advisory.
Dominator, Maverick, or Artemis — the suit you reach for most is the operative you really are.
Armour is a second skin. The one you wear most often is the truest version of yourself.
